title: Additional information in Installation webhook

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI folks,

It would be great of the Installation webhook also gave some additional information about how the user installed the app.

image501×419 16.3 KB

The above is a screenshot from our analytics page. It would be nice if this information was available on the installation webhook as this can be used for internal analysis.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the request @kranthi_thoughtflow !

Remember, everyone, that you can vote for this at the top of the screen to give it traction!
